description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, modern design with a stainless steel front panel and a large, black glass oven door. The upper section houses a digital control panel with a central time display, flanked by touch-sensitive buttons for various cooking functions and settings. The handle is robust and metallic, extending vertically along the left side of the oven door for easy gripping. The sides and rear of the cooker are finished in matte black, giving it a professional and contemporary appearance. The top section is flat and likely serves as the induction cooking surface, though individual burners are not visibly marked. The overall build suggests durability and is suitable for integration into urban kitchens or communal cooking spaces.
description: A modern induction cooker with a stainless steel front, digital control panel, and large black glass oven door, complemented by matte black sides and a sturdy handle.
description_view_0: The front view shows the stainless steel panel, digital control interface, and large black glass oven door with a metallic handle.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the matte black finish and the protruding control panel at the top, with the handle partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a solid matte black surface with no visible controls or openings, emphasizing the cooker's boxy shape.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the matte black finish and the side profile of the handle and control panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is horizontally oriented at the top front, featuring a central digital display flanked by touch-sensitive buttons on both sides. The buttons are arranged in two vertical columns, with clear labels and icons for various functions.
